name: nextboard-hardware-solution
description: Hardware solution design skills and workflows for embedded and hardware engineers.

interface.longDescription: Use this plugin to turn embedded product requirements into hardware architecture options, component selection, power trees, interface plans, PCB constraints, BOM risk notes, and validation plans.
defaultPrompt: Use $hardware-solution to design a hardware proposal for my embedded product.
Use $hardware-solution to review this schematic and BOM risk.
